name: Cottage Cole Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cottage cheese and mayonnaise in a bowl.
2. Add vinegar, onion juice, salt, caraway seed (if using), and chopped green pepper to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Mix in the shredded cabbage and diced apples.
4. Transfer the slaw mixture into a large serving bowl lined with cabbage leaves, if available.
5. Garnish with additional cottage cheese and chopped green pepper, as desired.
6. Chill before serving. Makes 8-10 servings.
